blockingIssues.description: The mixed return/value typed-lambda fix still re-runs semantic-value analysis through `check_block`, which replays move side effects and wrongly rejects semantically value-producing tails when the value branch consumes a non-Copy binding.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether the "Write tests first" step is mandatory or aspirational, or require workers to mark a deviation when implementation edits precede tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reviewer for fix feature `misc-typed-lambda-mixed-return-value-if` observed that worker session `e4aeb5c5-b185-484b-a656-3ac0962b2d49` edited `lib/typecheck.ml` before `test/test_codegen.ml` and `test/test_typecheck.ml`, while the handoff still marked `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`.
